package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for large_h_payload_built_only_for_json_response: Large gin.H payloads built as transient dynamic maps right before JSON rendering.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule322NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule322NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule322NegativeRecord) (Rule322NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario322Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule322NegativeService, input Rule322NegativeRecord) (Rule322NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule322NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
